summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently, as requested. No shared canonical was selected, no closure was planned, and no security-sensitive refs were detected. Ready-for-maintainer PRs are routed to human review; draft, proof/review-blocked, and replacement PRs are kept open without mutation.

actions.reason: Open focused contributor PR with sufficient proof and maintainer-review label; no duplicate, supersession, low-signal, or safe closure basis in this inventory shard.
Draft maintainer-owned work in progress with active waiting-on-author status; keep open and independent from this cleanup shard.
Related to open issue #60339 and plausibly useful, but unresolved review comments and failing checks make it unsafe to close or mark fixed-by-candidate.
Open P1 availability/compatibility fix that is ready for maintainer look; no closure basis and merge/fix actions are blocked by the job.
Fresh replacement PR for a closed historical source PR; keep open independently because it is focused contributor work with proof/check activity and no safe cleanup closure basis.

needs_human: #86913 needs maintainer technical and compatibility review before any merge decision.
#88908 needs maintainer technical, compatibility, and availability review before any merge decision.
